fastitems.midnightconfig.title: Fast Items Configuration
fastitems.midnightconfig.enable.tooltip:
Enables or disables all item rendering changes.
§aON§r: Items appear as flat 2D sprites.
§cOFF§r: Default Minecraft rendering.
fastitems.midnightconfig.castShadows.too:
Controls whether dropped items cast a shadow on the ground.
§aON§r: Items have a shadow underneath.
§cOFF§r: No shadow is rendered.
fastitems.midnightconfig.renderSidesOfIt:
Controls whether the sides of flat 2D items are visible.
§aON§r: Sides are visible (slightly 3D look).
§cOFF§r: Items are completely flat.
Controls whether 3D items like blocks also face the camera.
§aON§r: Blocks and 3D items face the camera (like Lunar Client).
§cOFF§r: 3D items spin normally.
